title: It's Love Again
writer: Marion Dix, Austin Melford, Lesser Samuels
actors: Jessie Matthews, Robert Young, Sonnie Hale
plot: Elaine Bradford is a young singer and dancer, looking for her big break. Peter Carlton is a gossip columnist facing a deadline and a blank page. So, Peter invents "Mrs. Smythe-Smythe", a mysterious Englishwoman who spends her days...
